basics.name: Aditya Murarka
basics.title: Software Engineer | MS in Software Engineering @ ASU | Ex-Walmart Global Tech India
basics.summary:
Software engineer with 5+ years of industry experience building and scaling production systems across frontend and backend stacks. I have developed event-driven platforms, modernized legacy systems, and built secure, high-performance applications for enterprise use cases.
Currently pursuing a Master's in Software Engineering at Arizona State University (Expected May 2026). Open to full-time software engineering opportunities in the U.S.

bullets: Co-developed a RAG-based chatbot to query downstream supply chain and inventory systems; spearheaded the React UI architecture and backend API integration.
Engineered an event-driven notification pipeline using a Kafka consumer in a Spring Boot backend; exposed REST APIs and pushed real-time status updates to a React frontend via WebSockets.
Migrated multiple high-impact AngularJS components to ReactJS, resolving legacy bottlenecks and boosting screen performance by 25–30% while accelerating new feature development.
Developed an Adobe Analytics dashboard to meticulously track supply chain activity, identifying idle resources and directly driving a 15% decrease in overall cloud spending.
Implemented IAM-driven authentication using a JWT to enforce secure, feature-level authorization, enabling granular, scalable access management across the application.

Identified error-prone Excel-based supply chain workflows as a data integrity risk; re-architected them into backend-driven web platforms with auditable state transitions, eliminating manual data entry errors and improving operational traceability.

Directed a frontend team of 5 engineers to deliver SPRY, a US sports compliance platform; orchestrated sprint planning and code reviews while constructing the core contract system utilizing complex multi-step forms, file uploads, and Chart.js earnings visualizations.

Architected a dynamic Content Management System utilizing GrapeJS, TypeScript, and Redux-Saga, engineering recursive-tree site navigation and a custom widget library enabling non-technical users to build and publish web applications.

Executed the frontend transition to a monorepo structure and established a centralized Storybook component library, slashing codebase duplication by 30% and expediting cross-project delivery timelines.

achievements.title: Cloud Cost Optimization
achievements.context: Built an Adobe Analytics dashboard to track supply chain activity and identify idle resources.

achievements.title: Performance Boost
achievements.context: Migrated high-impact AngularJS components to ReactJS and resolved legacy bottlenecks.

achievements.title: Code Reusability
achievements.context: Transitioned frontend to a monorepo and centralized Storybook component library.

projects.title: WeVibe - iOS Dating App
bullets: Designed a native iOS application using SwiftUI, establishing a scalable routing system with NavigationStack and predictable, centralized @Observable state management.
Orchestrated real-time matchmaking and chat features via WebSockets, seamlessly synchronizing complex UI states with background backend events using modern Swift concurrency.
Incorporated secure Firebase and Apple SSO authentication pipelines, and structured a resilient photo upload system utilizing raw URLSessions to interface directly with Google Cloud Storage.

projects.title: F1 AI
bullets: Developed an AI-powered Formula 1 race engineer assistant featuring a streaming LangChain and Gemini 2.0 Flash reasoning loop, RAG over FIA regulation PDFs via ChromaDB, a GradientBoosting race prediction model, and real-time AI commentary engine with WebSocket live timing, deployed across web, iOS, and MCP server.

projects.title: Gotham Watch – Crime Analysis Platform
bullets: Built an interactive crime analysis platform using Python, React.js, and GraphDB, leading data preprocessing, backend architecture with Flask and SPARQL queries, dynamic visualizations, and deployment on Microsoft Azure for scalable real-time access.

education.degree: Master of Science - MS, Computer Software Engineering
BTech - Bachelor of Technology, Computer Science

Spotlight award winner for outstanding project execution and team collaboration at Nineleaps (Mar 2021)
